text: Way forward developing a classification standard To limit the discussion at international level it is recommended to develop a classification standard in 2 steps. @ STEP 1: Develop a standard (according to the Directives with the stages NP-WD-CD-CDV-FDIS-IS) publishing the classification (classification hierarchy) only One table is necessary: The classification hierarchy including the detailed description of the classes (PreferredName, Definition, DefinitionSource, ClassID/Code) i [E %ä D — - STEP 1 5 [y Z ; & EL | =] [ @ STEP 2: Develop a CR (according to ANNEX SK.4.4) or a standard publishing all associated properties z Page 19 G.Rossi
